name: @quorvel/cloud-api
description: Quorvel Cloud: hosted reliability ledger — Fastify REST API implementing the @quorvel/core LedgerStore contract over Postgres, with API-key auth, per-org isolation, BullMQ/Redis event ingest, alerting, and Stripe metered billing.

scripts.test: tsx test/api.test.ts && tsx test/queue.test.ts && tsx test/alerts.test.ts && tsx test/billing.test.ts && tsx test/paddle.test.ts && tsx test/idempotency.test.ts && tsx test/ratelimit.test.ts && tsx test/dlq.test.ts
